task_completion.description: Open and read the cargo mission brief
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal output (e.g., cat) displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/cargo_mission_brief.txt.
Look for QGroundControl's Vehicle Setup -> Parameters menu showing the 'WPNAV_SPEED' parameter located and its value set to 300.
Look for QGroundControl's Vehicle Setup -> Parameters menu showing the 'WPNAV_ACCEL' parameter located and its value set to 100.

task_completion.description: Create a waypoint at the specified drop coordinates and altitude
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for QGroundControl's Plan view showing a mission waypoint with Latitude -35.3625, Longitude 149.1640, and Altitude set to 5.0m or lower.

task_completion.description: Add a servo release command to the mission
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a mission item in QGroundControl's Plan view configured as 'Set servo' (or DO_SET_SERVO) with the Servo ID (instance) set to 7 and the PWM value set to 1900.

task_completion.description: Save the mission plan to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for QGroundControl's 'File Save' dialog or a terminal/file manager confirming the mission is saved exactly as 'cargo_drop.plan' in the /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ directory.

integrity.description: Verify that QGroundControl was used to set parameters and plan the mission
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacted with the QGroundControl GUI to modify parameters and add mission items, rather than just manually typing a JSON .plan file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that parameter changes were actually saved to the vehicle
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent saved the modified WPNAV_SPEED and WPNAV_ACCEL parameters to the vehicle (e.g., clicking 'Save to Vehicle' or pressing Enter to confirm the new values in QGC), rather than just typing them without applying.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actively created the mission items
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent clicked on the map or used the mission item list to add the waypoint and servo commands, rather than copying a pre-existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires tuning ArduCopter parameters WPNAV_SPEED to 300 and WPNAV_ACCEL to 100. The mission plan must include a drop waypoint at Latitude -35.3625, Longitude 149.1640, with a maximum altitude of 5.0m. The cargo release mechanism requires a DO_SET_SERVO command (MAVLink ID 183) targeting servo instance 7 with a PWM value of 1900. The final mission must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/cargo_drop.plan.
